titleStmt.title: SII 42.7: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 7. (A.R. No. B. 8 of 1953-54.) Ellanūru, Tadipatri Taluk, Anantapur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone in the Veṅkaṭaramaṇasvāmin temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1592, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēshṭha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1670, May 24.

Records a decision arrived at by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇas of Vellalūru and the group of villages included in it (samuta) to subscribe at the rate of two rūkas for every hundred of the total land assessment (sistu-bērīju) for conducting the car-festival (ratha-mahōtsava) of the deity.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti Ōṁ* jayā
bhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbbu
lu 1592 pravarta(rdha)mā
na sādhāraṇa saṁvvatsa
ra jyēṣṭha śu 15 śrīma
dakhilāṁḍakōṭi braṁ
hmāṁḍḍanāyakā vēda vēdā
ṁttavēdya purāṇapuruṣō
ttamulaina velalūri śrī
veṁkkaṭēśvarla rathamahōtsa
va kaṭnānakugānu vellalūri
samutu khasuba modalaina
grāmāṁtrā(tarā)la reḍḍi karu(ra)
ṇālu yī tathātithi puṁ
ṇyakālamaṁddu dānadhā
rāpūrvakaṁggā nirna(rṇa)yaṁ
cēsukuṁnnadi . pratigrāmā
naku divāṇaṁvāru cēśi(si)na
sistu bērījuku nūṭiki ro
ṁḍēśi rūkala lekhkhanu dhā
rabōśi(vōsi) yiccināraṁ .
yī niṁrnaya (nirṇayaṁ) prakāraṁ
Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi
gā naḍpa(ḍapa)galavāraṁ .
yī dharmānaku ya(E)va(vva)
raṁ ganuka vighnaṁ cē
śi(si)nā kāśilō gō

hatya cēśi(si)na pā
pāna pōdumu A
ni vrāyiṁccina śilā
śāsanaṁ . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pa
radattānupālanaṁ .
paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt .
*) The letter is that of the Nāgarī script.
Digital edition of SII 42.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
